items.title: Performer describes locking eyes with Trump as they ducked for cover during shooting
items.dek: Oz Pearlman says he thought they were "about to die" as he and the US president lay half-a-metre apart on the ground during the incident.
items.body: Oz Pearlman says he thought they were "about to die" as he and the US president lay half-a-metre apart on the ground during the incident.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Colombia offers record $1.4m-reward for rebel it blames for deadly bomb attack
items.dek: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.
items.body: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Archbishop praises Pope's anti-war comments during Vatican visit
items.dek: Dame Sarah Mullally, the first female head of the Church of England, had a private discussion with Pope Leo during the trip.
items.body: Dame Sarah Mullally, the first female head of the Church of England, had a private discussion with Pope Leo during the trip.
items.author: IriLine Desk
